provenance.source_corpus: Prescribed Fire Increases Seedling Recruitment in a Natural Pitch Pine (Pinus rigida) Population at its Northern Range Limit

source_spans.text: Our results suggest that prescribed fire is effective in increasing pitch pine seedling recruitment even in a marginal natural pitch pine population.
fire was more effective than mechanical disturbance at increasing initial pitch pine seedling recruitment
Our results suggest that prescribed fire is effective in increasing pitch pine seedling recruitment even in a marginal natural pitch pine population.
Percent canopy cover significantly decreased following both the fire and mechanical treatments
depth to mineral soil decreased significantly in the fire treatment
